title: Autocomplete
description: A dropdown suggestion component that filters items as the user types. Supports data sources, templates, single/multiple selection, and dropdown look styling.

sections.title: Usage
sections.description: A simple example of using ax-autocomplete with a local array data source.

sections.title: Header and Footer Templates
sections.description: Demonstrates using listHeaderTemplate and listFooterTemplate to add custom content above and below the suggestion list when used inside ax-tag-box.

props.name: dataSource
props.description: Data source or array of items displayed in the suggestion list.

props.name: textField
props.description: Field name for display text. Inherited from MXSelectionValueComponent.

props.name: valueField
props.description: Field name for value key. Inherited from MXSelectionValueComponent.

props.name: disabledField
props.description: Field name indicating disabled items. Inherited from MXSelectionValueComponent.

props.name: multiple
props.description: Allow multiple selection. Inherited from MXSelectionValueComponent.

props.name: value
props.description: Selected value(s). Inherited from MXValueComponent.

props.name: placeholder
props.description: Placeholder text when no value is selected.

props.name: caption
props.description: Caption text shown in action sheet style header (when applicable).

props.name: delayTime
props.description: Delay in milliseconds before filtering while typing.

props.name: itemHeight
props.description: Height of each list item in pixels, or 'auto' to let the list measure.

props.name: maxVisibleItems
props.description: Maximum number of list items visible before scrolling.

props.name: itemTemplate
props.description: Custom item template for list rendering.

props.name: selectedTemplate
props.description: Custom template for selected items display.

props.name: emptyTemplate
props.description: Template to show when there are no results.

props.name: loadingTemplate
props.description: Template to show while items are loading.

props.name: listHeaderTemplate
props.description: Template used to display the header of the list.

props.name: listFooterTemplate
props.description: Template used to display the footer of the list.

props.name: dropdownWidth
props.description: Dropdown width in pixels.

props.name: look
props.description: Visual style of the dropdown. Inherited from MXLookComponent.

props.name: disabled
props.description: Disable the component. Inherited from MXInteractiveComponent.

props.name: readonly
props.description: Readonly mode. Inherited from MXValueComponent.

props.name: tabIndex
props.description: Tab index of the host. Inherited from MXInteractiveComponent.

props.name: id
props.description: Unique component id. Inherited from MXBaseComponent.

props.name: name
props.description: Component name. Inherited from MXValueComponent.

props.name: dirty
props.description: Indicates if the component is dirty. Inherited from MXValueComponent.

props.name: touched
props.description: Indicates if the component has been touched. Inherited from MXInteractiveComponent.

props.name: isRequired
props.description: Indicates if the component is required. Inherited from MXValueComponent.

props.name: selectedItems
props.description: Currently selected items. Inherited from MXSelectionValueComponent.

props.name: disabledCallback
props.description: Callback function to determine if an item should be disabled. Inherited from MXSelectionValueComponent.

events.name: onValueChanged
events.description: Emitted when the value changes. Inherited from MXValueComponent.

events.name: valueChange
events.description: Deprecated two-way binding change. Inherited from MXValueComponent.

events.name: readonlyChange
events.description: Emitted when readonly changes. Inherited from MXValueComponent.

events.name: disabledChange
events.description: Emitted when disabled changes. Inherited from MXInteractiveComponent.

events.name: onFocus
events.description: Emitted on focus. Inherited from MXInteractiveComponent.

events.name: onBlur
events.description: Emitted on blur. Inherited from MXInteractiveComponent.

events.name: stateChange
events.description: Emitted when validation state changes. Inherited from MXValueComponent.

events.name: onOptionChanged
events.description: Fired when an option changes. Inherited from MXBaseComponent.

events.name: onOpened
events.description: Emitted when the dropdown opens. Inherited from MXDropdownBoxBaseComponent.

events.name: onClosed
events.description: Emitted when the dropdown closes. Inherited from MXDropdownBoxBaseComponent.

events.name: validationRulesChange
events.description: Emitted when validation rules change. Inherited from MXValueComponent.

methods.content:
/**
 * Retrieves an item by its key.
 * @param {any} key
 */
getItemByKey(key: any): Promise<any> | any

/**
 * Filters the data source based on the provided search term.
 * @param {string} term
 */
search(term: string): void

/**
 * Refreshes the component by resetting state, clearing selection cache, refreshing the list, and closing the component.
 */
refresh(): void

/**
 * Opens the dropdown if it is not already open and the component is not disabled, then focuses the dropdown.
 *
 * @returns void - No return value. Dropdown becomes open and receives focus.
 * Inherited from MXDropdownBoxBaseComponent.
 */
open(): void

/**
 * Closes the dropdown if it is open and the component is not disabled, then focuses the host.
 *
 * @returns void - No return value. Dropdown is closed and focus returns to the host.
 * Inherited from MXDropdownBoxBaseComponent.
 */
close(): void

/**
 * Toggles the dropdown if the component is not disabled.
 *
 * @returns void - No return value. Switches between open and closed states.
 * Inherited from MXDropdownBoxBaseComponent.
 */
toggle(): void

/**
 * Resets the component value.
 *
 * @param e - Optional flag indicating if this is a user interaction.
 */
reset(e?: boolean): void

/**
 * Commits a value with optional user interaction flag.
 *
 * @param value - The value to commit.
 * @param u - Optional flag indicating if this is a user interaction.
 */
commitValue(value: T, u?: boolean): void

/**
 * Resets validation errors.
 */
resetErrors(): void

/**
 * Validates the component.
 *
 * @returns Promise<AXValidationSummary> - Validation result.
 */
validate(): Promise<AXValidationSummary>

/**
 * Adds a validation rule.
 *
 * @param rule - The validation rule to add.
 */
addValidationRule(rule: AXFormValidationRule): void

/**
 * Removes a validation rule.
 *
 * @param rule - The validation rule to remove.
 */
removeValidationRule(rule: AXFormValidationRule): void

/**
 * Writes a value to the component (ControlValueAccessor method).
 *
 * @param value - The value to write.
 */
writeValue(value: T): void

/**
 * Registers a change callback function (ControlValueAccessor method).
 *
 * @param fn - The callback function to register.
 */
registerOnChange(fn: (value: T) => void): void

/**
 * Registers a touched callback function (ControlValueAccessor method).
 *
 * @param fn - The callback function to register.
 */
registerOnTouched(fn: () => void): void

/**
 * Focuses the component.
 */
focus(): void

/**
 * Removes focus from the component.
 */
blur(): void

/**
 * Checks if the component is focused or has any focused element.
 *
 * @returns boolean - True if the component has focus.
 */
hasFocus(): boolean

/**
 * Sets the disabled state of the component.
 *
 * @param isDisabled - Whether the component should be disabled.
 */
setDisabledState(isDisabled: boolean): void

/**
 * Selects the specified items.
 *
 * @param items - Items to select.
 */
selectItems(...items: T[]): void

/**
 * Unselects the specified items.
 *
 * @param items - Items to unselect.
 */
unselectItems(...items: T[]): void

/**
 * Toggles the selection state of the specified items.
 *
 * @param items - Items to toggle.
 */
toggleSelect(...items: T[]): void

/**
 * Checks if an item is currently selected.
 *
 * @param item - Item to check.
 * @returns boolean - True if the item is selected.
 */
isItemSelected(item: T): boolean

/**
 * Checks if an item is disabled.
 *
 * @param item - Item to check.
 * @returns boolean - True if the item is disabled.
 */
isItemDisabled(item: T): boolean

/**
 * Gets the host HTML element of the component.
 *
 * @returns T - The native DOM element associated with this component.
 */
getHostElement<T = HTMLElement>(): T

/**
 * Sets a component option with optional lifecycle callbacks.
 *
 * @param option - The option configuration containing the name, value and optional before/after callbacks.
 */
setOption<T = any>(option: MXComponentSetOption<T>): void
